---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Klaat Code
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear description of what the problem is — e.g. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Is this client-side, or does it need a Klaatu (server) change?**
If it needs new routing behavior, model access, or quota logic, note that here — those live in the closed-source Klaatu service and need to be filed/discussed separately; this repo can only ship client-side features (new tools, UI, MCP/hooks/skills, etc).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Anything else — mockups, links to how another tool does it, etc.
